methods: bool is_alive() const { return m_lifeState == 0 && m_iHealth > 0; }
float health_pct() const { return m_iMaxHealth > 0 ? (float)m_iHealth / m_iMaxHealth : 0.f; }
const char* player_name() const { return m_iszPlayerName; }
const char* player_name() const { return m_iszPlayerName; }
const QAngle& eye_angles() const { return m_angEyeAngles; }
const Vec3& velocity() const { return m_vecVelocity; }
const QAngle& eye_angles() const { return m_angEyeAngles; }
const Vec3& velocity() const { return m_vecVelocity; }
